title: orchis latifolia subsp. majalis
intro: Orchis latifolia subsp. majalis, also known as the autumn lady's tresses, is a type of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Orchis latifolia subsp. majalis include its potential to treat various conditions such as respiratory issues, digestive problems, and skin irritations. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies like infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
